shows.title: Gobekli Tepe & Karahan Tepe / UFO Disclosure
shows.first_half: First Half: Writer Laird Scranton will delve into the enigmatic Turkish archaeological sites of Göbekli Tepe and Karahan Tepe, which offer some of the earliest known evidence of organized civilization dating back roughly 11,000 years. He’ll explore what may have driven ancient hunter-gatherers to gather in this region and develop sophisticated megalithic stoneworking.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Stephen Bassett is a political activist pressing for formal disclosure of an extraterrestrial presence engaging the human race. He'll report on how the disclosure movement has picked up momentum, and will address the recently released government files.

shows.title: Life of Jimmy Chagra / Open Lines
shows.first_half: Writer Jack Sheehan joins guest host Rich Berra (email) to discuss the extraordinary life and criminal career of notorious marijuana smuggler Jimmy Chagra. Through persistence and a stroke of luck, Sheehan located Chagra living under an assumed identity in witness protection after he served 23 years in federal prison. Their conversation will explore Chagra’s rise in the drug trade, his legal battles, and the sensational case in which he was accused, but ultimately acquitted, of arranging the murder of Federal Judge John Wood. Followed by Open Lines. Give Rich a call and discuss whatever is on your mind!
